results.title: No Plan to Use Temple Gold for Monetisation, Says Govt
results.description: It also clarified that claims suggesting gold plates on temple towers, doors, or other temple structures will be considered as 'Strategic Gold Reserves of India' are false, misleading, and entirely baseless.

results.title: Your borrowing rates are likely to go up this year. Here's why
results.description: If energy prices remain elevated and the rupee remains under pressure, market experts see a possibility of several rate hikes by the RBI this financial year
